topic: A student discovers their teacher follows them on social media
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya bounced in her seat, a wide grin stretching across her face as she scrolled through her phone. She had just finished submitting her project, and the feeling of accomplishment was buzzing under her skin. Then, a notification popped up. It was from Mr. Harrison. Her heart gave a little skip. Clicking on the profile, she saw a recent post—a picture of a rare antique telescope. Below it, in the caption, was a comment she recognized instantly: "Great work on the astrophysics presentation, Maya!" A sudden warmth flooded her chest, making her breath catch. She quickly minimized the app, a giddy flutter starting in her stomach. She couldn't stop smiling; this was just… wonderful.

[story 2]

Liam leaned back in his chair, tapping his pen rapidly against his notebook, a bright spark igniting behind his eyes. He’d just received the highest grade on the midterm, and the sheer joy of it made him want to jump up and shout. While checking his notifications, he saw Mr. Davies’ profile picture. Then, a story update appeared—a short video clip of Mr. Davies hiking in the mountains. Liam’s jaw dropped slightly. He reread the caption, which was a simple "Enjoying the view!" A slow, delighted smile spread across his face. He felt an irrepressible urge to share this discovery, a bubbling excitement making his fingers twitch as he navigated away from the app.

[story 3]

Sarah practically vibrated in her desk as she reviewed her final essay. The feeling of success was electric, making her hands tremble slightly as she reread the feedback. When she opened Instagram, she spotted Mr. Evans’ profile. A recent photo showed him laughing with a group of students outside the school gates. Her gaze lingered. Then, she saw a comment directed at her recent submission: "Your analysis of the symbolism was truly insightful, Sarah." A wave of pure delight washed over her, making her let out a soft, surprised giggle. She quickly tucked her phone away, her cheeks flushed, feeling a powerful surge of positive energy course through her limbs.
